# terrible_cisco_dnac_sda_virtual_network_ip_pool (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `autoGenerateVlanName` (Boolean) It will auto generate vlanName, if vlanName is empty(applicable for L3 and INFRA_VN).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ipPoolName` (String) IpPoolName query parameter.
- `isBridgeModeVm` (Boolean) Bridge Mode Vm enablement flag (applicable for L3 and L2 and default value is False ).
- `isCommonPool` (Boolean) Common Pool enablement flag(applicable for L3 and L2 and default value is False ).
- `isIpDirectedBroadcast` (Boolean) Ip Directed Broadcast enablement flag(applicable for L3 and default value is False ).
- `isL2FloodingEnabled` (Boolean) Layer2 flooding enablement flag(applicable for L3 , L2 and always true for L2 and default value is False ).
- `isLayer2Only` (Boolean) Layer2 Only enablement flag and default value is False.
- `isThisCriticalPool` (Boolean) Critical pool enablement flag(applicable for L3 and default value is False ).
- `isWirelessPool` (Boolean) Wireless Pool enablement flag(applicable for L3 and L2 and default value is False ).
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `poolType` (String) Pool Type (applicable for INFRA_VN).
- `scalableGroupName` (String) Scalable Group Name(applicable for L3).
- `siteNameHierarchy` (String) SiteNameHierarchy query parameter.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `trafficType` (String) Traffic type(applicable for L3 and L2).
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `virtualNetworkName` (String) VirtualNetworkName query parameter.
- `vlanId` (String) Vlan Id(applicable for L3 , L2 and INFRA_VN).
- `vlanName` (String) Vlan name represent the segment name, if empty, vlanName would be auto generated by API.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `dnac_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco DNAC Python SDK
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
